citations.document_title: Weddin Shire Council Planning Proposal Reclassification of Land - Lot 133 DP 1081488
citations.claim: Weddin Shire Council is proposing to reclassify a vacant parcel of land, Lot 133 DP1081488, approximately 30071 m2, located at Stan McCabe Drive Grenfell NSW 2810 .

citations.claim: Weddin Shire Council is proposing to reclassify a vacant parcel of land, Lot 133 DP1081488, approximately 30071 m2, located at Stan McCabe Drive Grenfell NSW 2810 .

citations.document_title: Weddin Shire Council Planning Proposal Reclassification of Land - Lot 133 DP 1081488
citations.claim: The proposal seeks to change the land's classification from "Community" to "Operational" land under the Local Government Act 1993, and remove its public reserve status .
